heading: For Everyday Cooking
content:
| Use Case           | Suggested Amount                    |
| ------------------ | ----------------------------------- |
| Vegetable cooking  | 1–2 tablespoons for 2–4 servings    |
| Dal tempering      | 1–2 teaspoons per pot               |
| Fish curry         | 1–3 tablespoons depending on recipe |
| Bhorta             | 1–2 teaspoons per serving           |
| Pickle preparation | As required by recipe               |

heading: As a Finishing Oil
content:
| Dish                     | Suggested Amount         |
| ------------------------ | ------------------------ |
| Bhorta                   | ½–1 teaspoon per serving |
| Lentils (Dal)            | ½–1 teaspoon per bowl    |
| Boiled vegetables        | ½–1 teaspoon per serving |
| Salad-style preparations | ½–1 teaspoon per serving |

</section>
